title: grammitis dolichosora
intro: Grammitis dolichosora, also known as the fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae and is native to tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The plant is often prepared into herbal remedies, including teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the dried leaves in hot water.
